ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Low Fat Yogurt (90%) [Skim Milk, Enzyme (Lactase), Live Yogurt Cultures], Salted Caramel Flavoured Blend (10%) [Water, Rice Starch, Natural Flavours, Natural Colour (Caramel), Vegetable Gums (Fruit Pectin, Locust Bean Gum), Stevia Leaf Extract, Mineral Salt (Calcuim Citrate), Salt, Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Sodium Citrate)].
